title: Design synchronization hook with auto-save and WebSocket updates
purpose: Manages loading and saving design data from/to the API, handles auto-saving with debouncing, and processes remote updates via WebSocket.
module_context: Exports a hook function useDesignSync that manages the lifecycle of a design's scene graph including loading, saving, and handling remote changes.

steps.content: Collect all nodes from the scene graph into a serializable array.
Serialize Map fields like variables, variableCollections, and activeMode into key-value pairs.
Encode image data as base64 strings for JSON serialization.
Combine all serialized data into a single JSON string.
Parse the JSON string into a structured object.
Initialize a new scene graph instance.
Reconstruct nodes from the parsed data, merging with default values.
Apply properties from MCP-created designs to actual node fields.
Restore Map fields like variables, variableCollections, and activeMode from serialized entries.
Decode image data from base64 strings back into Uint8Array.
Initialize references for tracking last saved version, save timer, loading state, and saving state.
Subscribe to session store changes to track current session and update design function.
Subscribe to design editor store changes to track scene version.
Load design from API when designId changes, handling loading states and errors.
Debounce and save scene graph changes to API when sceneVersion changes.
Handle incoming WebSocket updates by deserializing and applying changes to the scene graph.
Skip processing if the design is currently loading.
Deserialize the incoming content into a scene graph.
Apply the deserialized graph to the current scene.
Initialize the design editor store from the updated graph.
Update the last saved version reference to match the current scene version.
